notes: Fixed UTS exemplar atoms rewritten in generated-feature format to guide LLM atom generation.

features.description: Example fixed feature: mean best overlap from source columns to target columns.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    cols_a = stats_a["column_value_sets"]
    cols_b = stats_b["column_value_sets"]
    total = 0.0
    used = 0
    for values_a in cols_a:
        best = 0.0
        for values_b in cols_b:
            score = helpers["set_jaccard"](values_a, values_b)
            if score > best:
                best = score
        total += best
        used += 1
    return float(total) / float(used) if used > 0 else 0.0
